name: xiaopozhan-server
description: 小破站后端 API - 留言与明信片

scripts.start:deploy: node server/seed.js && node server/sync-frontend.js && node server/index.js
scripts.start:deploy:force: node server/seed.js && node server/sync-frontend.js --force && node server/index.js
scripts.restart: lsof -ti:3002 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node server/index.js
